philosophy: Every prompt must describe a REAL photograph, not a render. Specify the camera, lens, and light as if briefing a DP.

camera_packages.documentary: shot on ARRI Alexa Mini, Cooke S7i 50mm T2.0, natural available light, handheld
camera_packages.cinematic: shot on RED V-Raptor, Atlas Mercury anamorphic 40mm T2.2, golden hour, shallow depth of field
camera_packages.intimate: shot on Sony FX3, Sigma 35mm f/1.4 Art, soft window light, close focus distance
camera_packages.epic: shot on ARRI Alexa 65, Hasselblad 30mm, aerial perspective, magic hour
camera_packages.macro: shot on Canon R5, Laowa 100mm f/2.8 2:1 macro, diffused natural light, razor thin depth of field
camera_packages.vintage: shot on 16mm Bolex, Switar 25mm f/1.4, slight halation, warm color cast, organic film grain

negative_prompt: cgi, 3d render, digital art, illustration, anime, cartoon, plastic, airbrushed, smooth skin, oversaturated, hdr, stock photo watermark, artificial lighting, perfect symmetry, uncanny valley

landscape_wide.example: Rolling hills with scattered wildflowers stretching to a distant tree line, late afternoon, thin clouds diffusing warm sunlight, atmospheric haze in the valleys, shot on ARRI Alexa 65, Hasselblad 30mm, golden hour
landscape_wide.motion_prompt: slow dolly forward, gentle parallax between foreground flowers and distant hills, 180-degree shutter natural motion blur

object_closeup.example: A weathered leather notebook open on a wooden desk, visible grain in the wood, dust motes floating in a shaft of warm window light, shallow depth of field, shot on Sony FX3, Sigma 35mm f/1.4 Art, soft window light
object_closeup.motion_prompt: slow push in on the notebook, rack focus from desk surface to page text, subtle handheld micro-movement

abstract_concept.example: Light refracting through a glass prism casting rainbow caustics on a concrete wall, dust particles visible in the light beams, slightly out of focus foreground element, shot on ARRI Alexa Mini, Cooke S7i 50mm T2.0
abstract_concept.motion_prompt: slow pan following the light, gentle focus drift, tripod with subtle vibration

tech_visualization.example: Server rack in a dimly lit data center, blue LED indicators casting subtle glow on cable bundles, cool ambient light from overhead fluorescents, visible dust in the air, shot on Sony FX3, Sigma 35mm f/1.4 Art
tech_visualization.motion_prompt: slow tracking shot along the server row, shallow depth of field rack focus between near and far servers
tech_visualization.avoid: holographic overlays, floating UI elements, sci-fi aesthetics

human_wide.example: Silhouette of a person standing at a floor-to-ceiling window overlooking a city at dusk, warm interior light behind them, their reflection subtle in the glass, shot on ARRI Alexa Mini, Cooke S7i 50mm T2.0, natural available light
human_wide.motion_prompt: slow dolly in toward the figure, gentle rack focus from reflection to cityscape, tripod smooth
human_wide.avoid: close-up face, visible hands doing tasks, front-facing portrait

nature_macro.example: Morning dew on a spider web between two blades of grass, each droplet refracting the soft dawn light, bokeh circles from distant foliage, shot on Canon R5, Laowa 100mm f/2.8 2:1 macro, diffused early morning light
nature_macro.motion_prompt: extremely slow push in, gentle breeze causing micro-movement in the web, rack focus through droplets
nature_macro.avoid: insects with visible faces, perfect symmetry

architecture.structure: [building/structure with texture], [time of day], [human scale element], [camera_package]
architecture.example: Brutalist concrete building facade with visible form marks and weather staining, late afternoon side-light creating deep shadows, a single person walking at the base for scale, shot on RED V-Raptor, Atlas Mercury anamorphic 40mm T2.2
architecture.motion_prompt: slow tilt up from street level to roofline, anamorphic lens flare from sun at edge of frame

always: Specify camera type: dolly, crane, tracking, tripod, handheld
Specify speed: slow, gentle, subtle (fast = artifacts)
Specify shutter: '180-degree shutter, natural motion blur'
Keep it simple: ONE camera movement per clip
never: Whip pans or fast rotations (artifact magnets)
Text that needs to be readable (will distort)
kling_motion_rules.cfg_scale: 0.5 default. 0.3 for creative freedom. 0.7 for strict adherence. Never above 0.8.
